latestPrediction.title: Tracked opportunity
latestPrediction.recommendationRationale: Recommend No Bid because the pursuit is currently undermined by Weak knowledge coverage, Bid strength is not yet convincing, Buyer-specific headwind.
latestPrediction.strategistSummary: This pursuit is currently below a confident win threshold and should be qualified hard before further spend.

factors.title: Weak knowledge coverage
factors.explanation: The pursuit does not yet have enough organization-specific evidence across the required themes.
factors.evidence: Knowledge coverage 0. Missing areas: coverage gaps remain unresolved.
factors.remediation: Upload relevant case studies, certifications, and policies before final qualification.

factors.title: Bid strength is not yet convincing
factors.explanation: The current workspace and review signals suggest the bid would not compete strongly without more work.
factors.remediation: Raise completion, evidence depth, and buyer-specific differentiation before committing full bid effort.

factors.title: Add stronger comparable delivery proof
factors.explanation: Comparable case studies and quantified experience remain one of the fastest ways to improve evaluator confidence.
factors.evidence: Experience section completion 0 with sector win rate 61%.
factors.remediation: Add the most relevant sector case study and quantify outcomes, mobilisation, and buyer similarity.

factors.title: Buyer-specific headwind
factors.explanation: Historical outcome signals indicate a recurring risk in similar pursuits for this buyer context.
factors.evidence: Strong incumbent advantage seen in similar frameworks.
factors.remediation: Counter this explicitly in the executive summary with proof of differentiators and mobilisation confidence.
